descriptor.continuity_note: Presence and handoff cues keep their authority context across a system-open return; the companion provider's own thermal budget is declared honestly.
Cached and partial rows keep their honesty across monitors and DPI classes and reopen the same query target after suspend.
Shell chrome around embedded content qualifies on every row; the embedded provider's own OS file-handler registration is declared, not claimed.
An incident packet reopens the exact captured packet from a deep link with its authority context and survives suspend/resume intact.
A kernel that disappears on resume reopens the exact cell with an honest stale placeholder, never a silent blank.
A destructive export-and-wipe flow reopens its exact step after an interruption and keeps its authority context across a system-open return.
An expired preview route reopens to an honest expired placeholder rather than pretending the route is still live.
A capture reopens by id after suspend; thermal pressure throttles the sampler before it can drop frames into the wrong target.
A pipeline action reopens the exact run from a deep link with its authority context and keeps the blocked cue across every display.
Sync-pending and conflict states survive suspend/resume and keep their authority context when reopened from a deep link.
A replay reopens the exact captured trace after an interruption; battery saver slows replay decode before it corrupts the scrub head.
